author: Christopher-Lee-McClendon
name: SmearGate BOS Fix — 3-Seed Compliance Re-run of PR #1851
technique_summary: SmearGate BOS document boundary fix on PR #1787 base + SmearGate + LQER Asymmetric + Phased TTT (3 phases) + CaseOps SP8192

compliance.note: eval_time excludes torch.compile warmup (one-time process startup cost, not evaluation work). All submissions using torch.compile have this overhead.

notes: Compliance re-run of PR #1868 (originally PR #1851 reproduction). Original submission had GPTQ_RESERVE_SECONDS=0.5 which caused GPTQ hessian collection to extend past the 600s training budget. Re-run uses GPTQ_RESERVE_SECONDS=8.0 so training loop ends at ~592s and GPTQ hessians complete by ~595.5s, well within budget. Code also reordered to serialize artifact before running pre-quant diagnostic. All 3 seeds re-run fresh; results consistent with originals (mean 1.06141 vs 1.06145).
